title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI tool for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally on macOS and Linux with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip-installable wrapper that exposes chat, generate, embed and pull APIs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama endpoints as a standard LLM interface.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’); runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that proxies Ollama via a Next.js API route.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Unofficial Elixir client for Ollama; wraps the REST API with Tesla.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for using Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and async streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a containerized service for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server that bridges channels to Ollama with per-user model selection.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama REST API with async HTTP and streaming.

title: r/ollama - Local LLaMA models are amazing
summary: Active subreddit discussing new models, performance tweaks and ecosystem tools.

title: Show HN: Ollama WebUI – Self-hosted ChatGPT interface for local models
summary: Hacker News thread showcasing the Ollama WebUI project and community feedback.
